---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, flag, engine, or provider
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that is hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

The command, flag, engine, or provider you have in mind, and roughly how it would
behave (inputs, outputs, what it reads/writes).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is preferable.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, examples, or a game/plugin format that motivates the request.
